atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a six-month history of knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports deep achy pain behind the kneecaps

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by sitting and going up and down stairs

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes ibuprofen to manage the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes aleve to manage the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the medication is not completely effective

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tenderness upon palpation of the knees

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a positive patellar grind test

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he is a runner

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he has significantly reduced his mileage due to the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he enjoys cycling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his office is downstairs

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no prior knee injuries

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen or aleve as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in 4 weeks to assess progress.
